rooms.name: Forest Clearing
rooms.description: Moonlight spills into a wide clearing ringed by ancient oaks. A crumbling stone well sits near the centre. Animal tracks cut through the mud near the tree line. A ring of scorched stones marks an old fire. The trees thicken to the north. A soggy path leads south. Loose stone breaks the ground east. Old fallen pines block the west trail.

features.label: W
features.desc: A stone well. The rope is gone. Cold air rises from the dark below.

features.label: T
features.desc: Animal tracks pressed deep in the mud. Something large passed here recently.

features.label: F
features.desc: A ring of scorched stones. Someone built a fire here, not long ago.

rooms.name: Shadow Trees
rooms.description: Tall trunks crowd together until the sky disappears. Every step snaps a twig too loud. Something watches from between the trees. A mossy boulder sits half-buried near the centre. Scratch marks scar the bark of a nearby pine — deep, like claws. The clearing is south.

features.label: B
features.desc: A mossy boulder, half-buried. Good for sitting. Or hiding behind.

features.label: S
features.desc: Deep claw marks in the bark. Something large made these. Recently.

rooms.name: Soggy Path
rooms.description: Mud clings to your boots with every step. The ground sucks at your feet like it wants to keep you. A gnarled root breaks the surface near the middle of the path. Somewhere south, water roars like it never sleeps. A rusted tin cup sits in the mud — someone else was here. The clearing is north.

features.label: R
features.desc: A thick gnarled root humps out of the mud. Easy to trip on in the dark.

features.label: C
features.desc: A rusted tin cup half-buried in the mud. Someone camped here before you.

rooms.name: Stone Foothills
rooms.description: Loose rock slides underfoot. The forest thins, replaced by cold stone and a rising wind. A boulder split by lightning marks this place. Scratched into the rock face: an arrow pointing up. The clearing is west.

features.label: B
features.desc: A boulder split clean by lightning. One half leans against the other like old friends.

features.label: I
features.desc: Scratched into the rock: an arrow pointing up. Below it, a word worn smooth. You cannot read it.

rooms.name: Fallen Pines
rooms.description: Old pines lie snapped and piled like bones. The air smells of pitch and rot. A rusted tin lantern hangs from a branch — someone was here before you. Deeper west the trees press so tight light fails entirely. The clearing is east.

features.label: L
features.desc: A rusted tin lantern on a low branch. The oil is long gone. But someone hung it here.

features.label: P
features.desc: Pines piled high, bark stripped white. They've been here for years.

rooms.name: Bramble Wall
rooms.description: A wall of brambles and thorned vines blocks the way. You'd get shredded without something to cut through.

requires.message: The brambles tear at you. You need a machete to cut through.

rooms.name: Rushing River
rooms.description: A river roars past, black and fast. The current would drag you under in seconds.

requires.message: The river is too violent to cross. You need a raft.

rooms.name: Black Cliffline
rooms.description: A sheer wall of dark rock rises ahead. Handholds are scarce. One slip and you're done.

requires.message: You can't climb this safely. You need climbing gear.

rooms.name: Deep Woods
rooms.description: The forest grows so thick the light dies entirely. You can feel the trees closing in. You'd need an axe to cut through.

requires.message: The forest is too dense. You'd need an axe to cut through.
